nasb.text: While they were telling these things, He Himself stood in their midst and *said to them, “Peace be to you.”

esv.text: As they were talking about these things, Jesus himself stood among them, and said to them, “Peace to you!”

cnv.text: 正說這話的時候，耶穌親自站在他們當中，說：“願你們平安。”

ccb.text: 正说的时候，耶稣出现在他们中间，说：“愿你们平安！”

csbs.text: 在他们说这些话的时候，耶稣亲自站在他们当中，对他们说：“愿你们平安！”
